mechanics: DOCUMENTED: the REALM-BOSS /25 COUNTER tracks the elemental dragon LORDS too (not only Galactic bosses) — 'The Firebreather has been defeated! (8/25)'. So defeating realm Lords + galactic/event bosses fills the /25 (or /30) counter toward the final spawn. TRADE system: '<player> wants to trade with you. Type "/trade <player>"' -> 'Trade Successful'. '/vault' command gives a free vault chest unlock (tip). Event bosses announced: Grand Sphinx, Pentaract Tower Ultra, Riverborn. Announcer personas: Chimera, Reaper, Dragon (+ Death Notifier). Max-level notifications.
